title: isodon excisus
intro: Isodon excisus, also known as the cutleaf isodon or Chinese isodon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a type of herb that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and promoting digestion. Isodon excisus is typically prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
